title: thysanotus newbeyi
intro: Thysanotus newbeyi, commonly known as Newbey's fringe lily, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asphodelaceae. It is native to Western Australia, and traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Thysanotus newbeyi include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and act as an antiseptic. The herbal preparations of the plant can be made into a decoction or infusion, and it is often used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
